data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The evidence does not provide any concrete validation that the system supports channel-specific visibility toggles without the need to clone offer definitions. While the linked use case mentions this requirement, there is no supporting evidence from the prior steps that confirms this functionality is implemented or operational. The lack of evidence specifically addressing the toggling of visibility for different channels indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of channel-specific visibility toggles without cloning offer definitions.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
